pipelines.description: Runs Tesseract OCR, then sends the extracted text to the configured OpenAI-compatible model for note context.

configuration.systemPrompt: You turn OCR text from screenshots into concise, factual Obsidian note context. Return only JSON.
configuration.taskPrompt: Analyze the OCR text. Extract a concise summary, possible meeting title, visible people, topics, projects, tags, and useful sections. If something is uncertain, omit it rather than guessing.

pipelines.description: Runs Tesseract OCR, asks the configured model for Teams meeting context, then normalizes confident participants separately from suggestions.

configuration.systemPrompt: You analyze OCR text from Microsoft Teams screenshots. Return only JSON and do not invent people, titles, actions, or topics.
configuration.taskPrompt: Extract Teams meeting context from the OCR text. Identify meetingTitle, visible participants as people with confidence from 0 to 1 and source text, agenda or visible context, action items, topics, projects, tags, and a concise summary. Put agenda/context/actions in sections. Use confidence below 0.75 for partial or ambiguous participant names.
